entry.title: Vielö Organic Facial Masque 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: vielö
Type: Facial Mask
Price: 40.00

Purifying organic mask to gently yet effectively cleanse, soothe and hydrate the skin.

Made with organic whey (nourishing), white clay (purifying), hyaluronic acid (hydrating), organic witch hazel water (nurturing), organic rosehip seed oil (soothing), and organic extracts of calendula (regenerating), cucumber (refreshing) and mallow (protecting).

Suitable for all skin types, also for dry and sensitive skin.

How to use: Apply a generous layer to clean face and neck. Leave for 15 minutes until dry. Rinse gently with warm water. Use once or twice a week.

Ingredients: Lactis Serum Proteinum**, Hamamelis Virginiana Water**, Rosa Canina Fruit Oil**, Glyceryl Stearate Citrate*, Cetyl Alcohol*, Glycerin**, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil**, Aqua*, Kaolin*, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter**, Triticum Vulgare (Wheat) Germ Oil**, Oenothera Biennis Oil**, Sodium Levulinate*, Glyceryl Caprylate*, Sodium Hyaluronate*, Citric Acid*, Xanthan Gum*, Sodium Anisate, Tocopherol*, Potassium Sorbate, Lavandula Angustifolia Flower Extract**, Cucumis Sativus Fruit Extract**, Malva Sylvestris Flower Extract**, Polyglyceryl-4 Caprate*, Calendula Officinalis Flower Extract**, Sodium Lactate*.

* from natural origin (99,8%)
** certified organic (81,7%)
*** from natural essential oils

Handmade in Austria

Inspired by circular economy, Vielö refines a high-quality by-product of cheese production, liquid organic whey, and uses it to create certified organic and sustainable skin and body care products.

entry.title: Vielö Organic Facial Scrub 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: vielö
Type: Facial Scrub
Price: 37.00

Gentle organic facial scrub to effectively cleanse and remove dead skin cells, leaving the skin soft and refreshed.

Made with organic whey (nourishing), finely ground apricot kernels (exfoliating), hyaluronic acid (hydrating), organic wheat germ oil (nurturing) and organic extracts of camomile (antiseptic), rose hip (anti-inflammatory) and marigold (regenerating).

Suitable for all skin types, also for dry and sensitive skin.

How to use: Massage gently into dry and clean skin. Moisten fingertips with warm water and massage again till the scrub turns into a white creamy texture. Rinse off with lukewarm water. Use 1-2 times per week.

Ingredients: Lactis Serum Proteinum**, Glycerin**, Triticum Vulgare (Wheat) Germ Oil**, Prunus Armeniaca Seed Powder**, Aqua*, Xanthan Gum*, Kaolin*, Sodium Levulinate*, Glyceryl Caprylate*, Sodium Anisate, Potassium Sorbate, Citric Acid*, Sodium Hyaluronate*, Lavandula Angustifolia Flower Oil**, Salvia Officinalis Oil**, Citronellol**/***, Pelargonium Graveolens Flower Oil**, Polyglyceryl-4 Caprate*, Rosa Canina Fruit Extract**, Matricaria Chamomilla Flower Extract**, Sodium Lactate*, Calendula Officinalis Flower Extract**.

* from natural origin (99,7%)
** certified organic (92,7%)
*** from natural essential oils

Handmade in Austria

Inspired by circular economy, Vielö refines a high-quality by-product of cheese production, liquid organic whey, and uses it to create certified organic and sustainable skin and body care products.

entry.title: Vielö Organic Conditioner 250ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: vielö
Type: Conditioner
Price: 32.00

Nourishing organic conditioner, specially designed to strengthen and moisturise damaged hair, leaving it soft and smooth.

Created with organic whey (nourishing), soy extract (invigorating), wheat germ oil (protecting), organic extracts of lavender (soothing), sage (strengthening) and mallow (moisturising).

Suitable for all hair types.

How to use: Apply after shampooing to wet hair. Massage gently into hair and on scalp. Rinse thoroughly.

Ingredients: Lactis Serum Proteinum**, Triticum Vulgare Germ Oil**, Polyglyceryl-3 Dicitrate/Stearate*, Cetyl Alcohol*, Glycerin**, Aqua*, Betaine*, Citric Acid*, Xanthan Gum*, Lavandula Angustifolia Flower Oil**, Tocopherol*, Salvia Officinalis Oil**, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil**, Potassium Sorbate, Citronellol**/***, Pelargonium Graveolens Flower Oil**, Geraniol**/***, Malva Sylvestris Flower Extract**, Lavandula Angustifolia Flower Extract**, Glycine Soja Seed Extract*, Urtica Dioica Leaf Extract**, Rosmarinus Officinalis Leaf Extract**, Polyglyceryl-4 Caprate*, Salvia Officinalis Leaf Extract**, Sodium Lactate*, Sodium Benzoate.

* from natural origin (99,8%)
** certified organic (88,9%)
*** from natural essential oils

Handmade in Austria

Inspired by circular economy, Vielö refines a high-quality by-product of cheese production, liquid organic whey, and uses it to create certified organic and sustainable skin and body care products.

entry.title: Vielö Organic Shampoo 250ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: vielö
Type: Shampoo
Price: 30.00

Nourishing organic shampoo, specially designed to cleanse, repair and moisturise damaged hair and sensitive scalps gently.

Created with organic whey (nourishing), black oats (moisturising), soy protein (strengthening) and organic extracts of lavender (soothing), nettle (antioxidant) and rosemary (stimulating).

Suitable for all hair types.

How to use: Shake well before use. Apply to wet hair. Massage gently into hair and on scalp. Rinse thoroughly.

Ingredients: Lactis Serum Proteinum**, Aqua*, Glycerin**, Decyl Glucoside*, Disodium Cocoyl Glutamate*, Xanthan Gum*, Betaine*, Polyglyceryl-3 Caprate*, Citric Acid*, Sodium Cocoyl Glutamate*, Lavandula Angustifolia Flower Oil**, Hydrolyzed Wheat Gluten*, Hydrolyzed Wheat Protein*, Potassium Sorbate, Salvia Officinalis Oil**, Citronellol**/***, Hydrolyzed Soy Protein*, Pelargonium Graveolens Flower Oil**, Geraniol**/***, Polyglyceryl-4 Caprate*, Lecithin*, Avena Strigosa Seed Extract*, Malva Sylvestris Flower Extract**, Lavandula Angustifolia Flower Extract**, Caesalpinia Spinosa Gum*, Urtica Dioica Leaf Extract**, Rosmarinus Officinalis Leaf Extract**, Sodium Lactate*, Salvia Officinalis Leaf Extract**, Sodium Benzoate.

* from natural origin (99,8%)
** certified organic (68,1%)
*** from natural essential oils

Handmade in Austria

Inspired by circular economy, Vielö refines a high-quality by-product of cheese production, liquid organic whey, and uses it to create certified organic and sustainable skin and body care products.

entry.title: Vielö Organic Foot Balm 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: vielö
Type: Facial Mask
Price: 20.00

Nourishing organic foot balm, specially designed to moisturise and soften dry feet and cracked heels.

Created with organic whey (nourishing), wheat germ oil (protecting), hyaluronic acid (hydrating), organic extracts of calendula (regenerating), lavender (soothing) and sage (strengthening).

Suitable for all skin types.

How to use: Apply to clean and dry skin and massage in well. Regular use helps to protect the skin from drying out.

Ingredients: Lactis Serum Proteinum**, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil**, Triticum Vulgare Germ Oil**, Polyglyceryl-3 Dicitrate /Stearate*, Cetyl Alcohol*, Glycerin**, Betaine*, Aqua*, Citric Acid*, Xanthan Gum*, Tocopherol*, Lavandula Angustifolia Flower Oil**, Sodium Hyaluronate*, Salvia Officinalis Oil**, Potassium Sorbate, Citronellol**/***, Pelargonium Graveolens Flower Oil**, Geraniol**/***, Lavandula Angustifolia Flower Extract**, Rosmarinus Officinalis Leaf Extract**, Polyglyceryl-4 Caprate*, Limonene**/***, Calendula Officinalis Flower Extract**, Salvia Officinalis Leaf Extract**, Sodium Lactate*, Citral**/***.

* from natural origin (99,8%)
** certified organic (88,9%)
*** from natural essential oil

Handmade in Austria

Inspired by circular economy, Vielö refines a high-quality by-product of cheese production, liquid organic whey, and uses it to create certified organic and sustainable skin and body care products.

entry.title: Vielö Organic Hand Wash Refill 500ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: vielö
Type: Hand Wash
Price: 39.00

Nourishing organic hand wash, specially designed to cleanse gently while leaving the hands soft and smooth.

Created with organic whey (nourishing), soy protein (strengthening) and organic extracts of lavender (soothing), nettle (antioxidant) and rosemary (stimulating).

Suitable for all skin types.

By choosing sustainable refills you take good care of your skin and our planet. 

How to use: Shake well before use. Dispense into wet hands. Rinse thoroughly. 

Ingredients: Lactis Serum Proteinum**, Aqua*, Glycerin**, Decyl Glucoside*, Disodium Cocoyl Glutamate*, Betaine*, Polyglyceryl-3 Caprate*, Xanthan Gum*, Sodium Cocoyl Glutamate*, Citric Acid*, Lavandula Angustifolia Flower Oil**, Salvia Officinalis Oil**, Potassium Sorbate, Citronellol**/***, Pelargonium Graveolens Flower Oil**, Geraniol**/***, Hydrolyzed Soy Protein*, Polyglyceryl-4 Caprate*, Sodium Lactate*, Caesalpinia Spinosa Gum*, Lavandula Angustifolia Flower Extract**, Urtica Dioica Leaf Extract**, Rosmarinus Officinalis Leaf Extract**, Salvia Officinalis Leaf Extract**, Sodium Benzoate.

Inspired by circular economy, Vielö refines a high-quality by-product of cheese production, liquid organic whey, and uses it to create certified organic and sustainable skin and body care products.

Created with organic whey (nourishing), wheat germ oil (protecting), hyaluronic acid (hydrating), organic extracts of calendula (regenerating), lavender (soothing) and sage (strengthening).

entry.title: Vielö Organic Body Scrub 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: vielö
Type: Body Scrub
Price: 19.50

Nourishing organic body scrub, specially designed to cleanse and exfoliate the skin gently, to remove dead skin cells and revitalise your body.

Created with organic whey (nourishing), finely ground apricot kernels (exfoliating), wheat germ oil (moisturising), organic extracts of birch leaf (purifying), lavender (soothing) and rosemary (stimulating).

Suitable for all skin types.

How to use: Shake well before use. Apply to damp skin. In circular movement massage in gently. Rinse off thoroughly. On contact with water and by gently massaging in, the scrub transforms into a nourishing lotion that can be washed off easily.

Ingredients: Lactis Serum Proteinum**, Glycerin**, Aqua*, Decyl Glucoside*, Prunus Armeniaca Seed Powder**, Triticum Vulgare Germ Oil**, Citric Acid*, Betaine*, Xanthan Gum*, Disodium Cocoyl Glutamate*, Sodium Cocoyl Glutamate*, Lavandula Angustifolia Flower Oil**, Potassium Sorbate, Salvia Officinalis Oil**, Citronellol**/***, Pelargonium Graveolens Flower Oil**, Geraniol**/***, Polyglyceryl-4 Caprate*, Lavandula Angustifolia Flower Extract**, Betula Alba Leaf Extract**, Glycine Soja Seed Extract*, Rosmarinus Officinalis Leaf Extract**, Sodium Lactate*, Salvia Officinalis Leaf Extract**, Sodium Benzoate.

* from natural origin (99,8%)
** certified organic (74,9%)
*** from natural essential oils

Handmade in Austria

Inspired by circular economy, Vielö refines a high-quality by-product of cheese production, liquid organic whey, and uses it to create certified organic and sustainable skin and body care products.

entry.title: Vielö Organic Night Cream 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: vielö
Type: Night Cream
Price: 59.00

Rich organic night cream to intensely hydrate and nourish the skin overnight and stimulate skin regeneration.

Created with organic whey (nourishing), rosehip seed oil (soothing), hyaluronic acid (hydrating), wheat germ oil (protecting) and organic extracts of chamomile (antiseptic), arnica (anti-inflammatory) and mallow (protecting).

Suitable for all skin types, also for dry and sensitive skin.

How to Use: Massage gently into freshly cleansed skin and neck. Use it in the evening and whenever your skin needs rich hydration.

Ingredients: Lactis Serum Proteinum**, Rosa Canina Fruit Oil**, Triticum Vulgare (Wheat) Germ Oil**, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil**, Glycerin**, Cera Alba**, Polyglyceryl-3 Polyricinoleate*, Aqua*, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter**, Sorbitan Sesquioleate*, Oenothera Biennis Oil**, Sodium Levulinate*, Glyceryl Caprylate*, Polyglyceryl-3 Ricinoleate, Sodium Hyaluronate*, Sodium Anisate, Tocopherol*, Citric Acid*, Potassium Sorbate, Lavandula Angustifolia Flower Oil**, Salvia Officinalis Oil**, Citronellol**/***, Pelargonium Graveolens Flower Oil**, Malva Sylvestris Flower Extract**, Viola Tricolor Extract**, Matricaria Chamomilla Flower Extract**, Arnica Montana Flower Extract**, Polyglyceryl-4 Caprate*, Geraniol**/***, Salvia Officinalis Leaf Extract**, Sodium Lactate*, Limonene**/***, Citral**/***.

Vendor: vielö
Type: Day Cream
Price: 52.00

Nourishing organic day cream to deliver long-lasting hydration, leaving the skin soft and smooth.

Created with organic whey (nourishing), hyaluronic acid (hydrating), organic apricot kernel oil (nurturing) and organic extracts of chamomile (soothing), pansy (protecting) and arnica (anti-inflammatory).

Suitable for all skin types, also for dry and sensitive skin.

How to Use: Massage gently into freshly cleansed skin and neck. Use it in the morning and evening and whenever your skin needs natural hydration. Perfect as make-up base.

entry.title: Vielö Organic Eye Cream 15ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: vielö
Type: Eye Cream
Price: 47.00

Nourishing organic eye cream to deliver long-lasting hydration and effectively nurture the delicate skin around the eyes.

Created with organic whey (nourishing), organic rosehip seed oil (soothing), hyaluronic acid (hydrating), organic sunflower oil (nurturing) and organic extracts of camomile (invigorating), eyebright (strengthening) and mallow (protecting).

Suitable for all skin types, also for dry and sensitive skin.

How to use: Shake well before use. Apply to clean and dry skin. Massage in gently. 

Ingredients: Lactis Serum Proteinum**, Rosa Canina Fruit Oil**, Polyglyceryl-3 Dicitrate/ Stearate*, Glycerin**, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil**, Cetyl Alcohol*, Aqua*, Prunus Armeniaca Kernel Oil**, Triticum Vulgare (Wheat) Germ Oil**, Sodium Levulinate*, Glyceryl Caprylate*, Sodium Hyaluronate*, Xanthan Gum*, Sodium Anisate, Tocopherol*, Potassium Sorbate, Citric Acid*, Polyglyceryl-4 Caprate*, Matricaria Chamomilla Flower Extract**, Malva Sylvestris Leaf Extract**, Euphrasia Officinalis Extract**, Sodium Lactate*, Salvia Officinalis Leaf Extract**, Lavandula Angustifolia Flower Oil**, Limonene**/***, Salvia Officinalis Oil**, Citronellol**/***, Pelargonium Graveolens Flower Oil**, Geraniol**/***, Citral**/***.

entry.title: Vielö Organic Hyaluron Serum 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: vielö
Type: Face Serum
Price: 69.00

Intensely nourishing organic hyaluron serum to deliver long- lasting moisture and to strengthen the skin.

Created with organic whey (nourishing), hyaluronic acid (hydrating) and organic extracts of calendula (regenerating), rose hip (anti-inflammatory) and eyebright (strengthening).

Suitable for all skin types, also for dry and sensitive skin.

How to Use: Shake well before use. In the morning and evening apply 1-2 drops on the hands and gently tap into cleansed face and neck.

Ingredients: Lactis Serum Proteinum**, Aqua*, Glycerin**, Betaine*, Sodium Levulinate*, Xanthan Gum*, Glyceryl Caprylate*, Sodium Hyaluronate*, Sodium Anisate, Potassium Sorbate, Lavandula Angustifolia Flower Oil**, Salvia Officinalis Oil**, Citronellol**/***, Polyglyceryl-4 Caprate*, Pelargonium Graveolens Flower Oil**, Citric Acid*, Euphrasia Officinalis Extract**, Rosa Canina Fruit Ex- tract**, Sodium Lactate*, Geraniol**/***, Calendula Officinalis Flower Extract**, Limonene**/***, Citral**/***.

* from natural origin (99,7%)

Handmade in Austria

Inspired by circular economy, Vielö refines a high-quality by-product of cheese production, liquid organic whey, and uses it to create certified organic and sustainable skin and body care products.

entry.title: Vielö Organic Toner 100ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: vielö
Type: Face Toner
Price: 34.00

Nourishing organic toner to gently soothe, refresh and cleanse the skin.

Created with organic whey (nourishing), organic witch hazel water (nurturing), hyaluronic acid (hydrating) and organic extracts of calendula (regenerating), mallow (protecting) and chamomile (antiseptic).

Suitable for all skin types, also for dry and sensitive skin. 

How to use: Shake well before use. Splash into hands and massage gently into face and neck or spray directly onto face. Use it in the morning and evening and whenever your skin needs refreshing hydration. Use before applying a moisturizer. 

Ingredients: Lactis Serum Proteinum **, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil **, Triticum Vulgare Germ Oil **, Polyglyceryl-3 Dicitrate / Stearate *, Cetyl Alcohol *, Glycerin **, Betaine *, Aqua *, Citric Acid *, Xanthan Gum *, Tocopherol *, Lavandula Angustifolia Flower Oil **, Sodium Hyaluronate *, Potassium Sorbate, Salvia Officinalis Oil **, Citronellol ** / ***, Pelargonium Graveolens Flower Oil **, Geraniol ** / ***, Polyglyceryl-4 Caprate *, Arnica Montana Flower Extract **, Lavandula Angustifolia Flower Extract **, Rosmarinus Officinalis Leaf Extract **, Limonene ** / ***, Calendula Officinalis Flower Extract **, Salvia Officinalis Leaf Extract **, Sodium Lactate *, Citral ** / ***.

* from natural origin (99,7%)
** certified organic (87,1%)
*** from natural essential oils

Handmade in Austria

Inspired by circular economy, Vielö refines a high-quality by-product of cheese production, liquid organic whey, and uses it to create certified organic and sustainable skin and body care products.

entry.title: Vielö Organic Cleansing Milk 100ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: vielö
Type: Face Cleansing
Price: 32.00

Gentle organic cleansing milk to remove make-up and dirt effortlessly. Soothes the skin, leaving it soft and hydrated.

Created with organic whey (nourishing), organic wheat germ oil (nurturing), organic rosehip seed oil (soothing) and organic extracts of chamomile (antiseptic), arnica (anti-inflammatory) and sage (antibacterial).

Suitable for all skin types, also for dry and sensitive skin.

How to Use: Massage gently into dry skin across face and neck. Rinse with lukewarm water. Use it in the morning and evening and whenever your skin needs natural cleansing. Shake before use.

Ingredients: Lactis Serum Proteinum**, Rosa Canina Fruit Oil**, Prunus Armeniaca Kernel Oil**, Polyglyceryl-3 Dicitrate/Stearate*, Glycerin**, Triticum Vulgare (Wheat) Germ Oil**, Aqua*, Cetyl Alcohol*, Sodium Levulinate*, Glyceryl Caprylate*, Citric Acid*, Xanthan Gum*, Sodium Anisate, Tocopherol*, Lavandula Angusti- folia Flower Oil**, Potassium Sorbate, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil**, Salvia Officinalis Oil**, Citronellol**/***, Pelar- gonium Graveolens Flower Oil**, Polyglyceryl-4 Caprate*, Matricaria Chamomilla Flower Extract**, Arnica Montana Flower Extract**, Geraniol**/***, Sodium Lactate*, Calendula Officinalis Flower Extract**, Salvia Officinalis Leaf Extract**, Limonene**/***, Citral**/***.

Inspired by circular economy, Vielö refines a high-quality by-product of cheese production, liquid organic whey, and uses it to create certified organic and sustainable skin and body care products.
